title: Draft RBI (Housing Finance Companies) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 - Recovery and Collection Norms
description: <cite index="31-2">RBI issued Draft Reserve Bank of India (Housing Finance Companies) Second Amendment Directions, 2026 proposing revised norms relating to recovery of loans and engagement of recovery agents by Housing Finance Companies (HFCs)</cite>. <cite index="31-4">The amendment proposes deletion of the current sub-section on guidelines for engaging recovery agents and substitution with a new provision requiring HFCs to comply with paragraphs 100A to 100W of Chapter III of the RBI (Non-Banking Financial Companies – Responsible Business Conduct) Directions, 2025</cite>. <cite index="31-6">The Directions will come into effect from July 1, 2026</cite>.
